query: 偏股混合型基金规模最大的基金公司前10是谁

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_company, SUM(fund_size) AS total_size FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '偏股混合' GROUP BY fund_company ORDER BY total_size DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT fc.fund_company AS 基金公司, ls.total_size AS 规模总和 FROM latest_size ls JOIN fund_company fc ON ls.fund_company = fc.fund_company LIMIT 10;

plan.rationale: 根据偏股混合型基金的最新规模，统计规模总和并排序，取前10名的基金公司
